description: Horcrux threshold signing monitoring dashboard for CometBFT validators. Tracks signing activity, cosigner health, Raft cluster status and sentry connectivity across multiple chains. Built by Cumulo: cumulo.pro

options.content:
CUMULO.PRO
HORCRUX MONITORING
📄 Documentation

panels.title: Total Times Combined Signature is Invalid

panels.description: This metric counts the total number of times the number of co-signatories does not reach the threshold necessary to validate an operation or transaction.
panels.title: Total Times Cosigners doesn't reach threshold
Metrics that don't always correspond to block time
Seconds Since Last Local Start Sign (May increase beyond block time, Rarely important)

panels.description: Indicates the last block height for which a precommit was signed.
panels.title: Last block height signed

panels.description: Seconds Since Last Local Finish Sign (Should stay below 2 * Block Time)
panels.title: Seconds Since Last Local Finish Sign (Should stay below 2 * Block Time)

panels.description: Each block, Nonce Secrets are shared between Cosigners.
panels.title: Seconds Since Last Local Ephemeral Share Sign (Should not increase beyond block time)
Watching For Cosigner Trouble

panels.description: Represents the last precommit round that was signed.
panels.title: Last precommit round to be signed

panels.description: will note when the leader is not able to get a signature from the peer.
panels.title: Consecutive Threshold Signature Parts Missed
Checking Signing Performance

panels.description: This metric measures the time it takes for the system to reach the threshold.
panels.title: Seconds taken to get threshold of cosigners available

panels.description: After reaching the threshold, all cosigners should sign quickly
panels.title: Seconds taken to get all cosigner signatures

panels.description: Per-cosigner signature lag as seen by the raft leader.
panels.title: Time taken to get cosigner signature
Raft data
Total Times Signer is Raft Leader

panels.description: Counts the total number of times the Raft leader has failed to be elected.
panels.title: Total Raft Leader Election Timeout

panels.description: Shows the total number of times the signatory has not been the leader.
panels.title: Total Signer Raft Not Leader
Sentry connect

panels.description: Total TCP connection attempts to sentinel nodes.
panels.title: TCP connection attempts to sentinel nodes

panels.description: TCP connection attempts per cosigner per sentry.
panels.title: TCP connection attempts to sentinel nodes

title: Horcrux Monitoring · Cumulo.Pro
